query:
INSERT INTO reviews (artisanId, customerId, rating, comment, status, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
(1, 239, 5, 'Kwame built a beautiful wardrobe for our bedroom. The finish is excellent and he delivered on time. Highly recommend!', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(1, 240, 5, 'Fantastic work on our kitchen cabinets. Very professional and uses quality wood. Will definitely use again.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(2, 239, 5, 'Abena fixed our electrical fault quickly and safely. Very knowledgeable and her prices are fair.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(2, 240, 4, 'Good work on the wiring. Came on time and cleaned up after. Would recommend to others.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(3, 239, 5, 'Kofi sorted our bathroom plumbing in one day. No mess, no fuss. Excellent service!', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(3, 240, 4, 'Fixed a major pipe burst at our office. Responded within the hour. Very reliable plumber.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(4, 239, 5, 'Ama made my wedding dress and it was absolutely stunning. She understood exactly what I wanted.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(4, 240, 5, 'Best tailor in Accra! My Kente outfit for my graduation was perfect. Everyone asked who made it.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(5, 239, 4, 'Yaw diagnosed my car problem fast and fixed it at a reasonable price. Good mechanic.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(5, 240, 5, 'Excellent work on my Toyota Corolla engine. Very honest about what needed fixing. Will return.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(6, 239, 5, 'Akosua painted our entire house interior. The colour choices she suggested were perfect. Very neat work.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(6, 240, 4, 'Good painter. Finished the exterior in two days and the result is clean. Fair pricing too.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(7, 239, 4, 'Kwesi made our security gate and it looks great. Strong welding and good design.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(7, 240, 5, 'Excellent burglar-proof windows. Very sturdy and the design matches our house perfectly.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(8, 239, 5, 'Efua tiled our bathroom beautifully. Very clean work and she finished ahead of schedule.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(8, 240, 4, 'Good tiling job in our kitchen. Neat grout lines and she did not waste any tiles.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(9, 239, 5, 'Nana repaired our roof before the rains came. Solid work and very professional team.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(9, 240, 5, 'Installed a new roof for our house extension. Excellent quality and competitive price.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(10, 239, 5, 'Adwoa installed our AC perfectly. It has been running smoothly for months. Great service!', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(10, 240, 4, 'Serviced our office AC units. All working perfectly now. Quick and professional.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(11, 239, 4, 'Kojo made our aluminium windows. Good quality and reasonable price for Kumasi.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(11, 240, 5, 'Beautiful sliding doors from Appiah Aluminium. Smooth operation and great finish.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(12, 239, 5, 'Maame wove the most beautiful Kente for our family reunion. Authentic and high quality.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(12, 240, 5, 'Ordered wedding Kente for 10 family members. All pieces were perfect and delivered on time.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(13, 239, 5, 'Fiifi installed our solar system and we have not had a power problem since. Excellent investment!', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(13, 240, 5, 'Professional solar installation for our shop. Fiifi explained everything clearly. Very satisfied.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(14, 239, 4, 'Borehole was drilled and ready in 3 days. Water quality is excellent. Good service.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(14, 240, 5, 'Akua drilled a borehole for our compound house. Clean water and good pump. Highly recommended.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(15, 239, 5, 'Kwabena came to my location and fixed my car on the spot. Very convenient and professional.', 'published', NOW(), NOW()),
(15, 240, 4, 'Good mobile mechanic. Came quickly when my car broke down on the Accra-Tema motorway.', 'published', NOW(), NOW());
